properties.description: Detects logins from two geographically distant locations within 1 hour where travel between them would be physically impossible. Uses Haversine approximation via coordinate distance. Mapped to MITRE ATT&CK T1078 - Valid Accounts.
properties.query:
let timeWindow = 1h;
let minDistanceKm = 500;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(timeWindow)
| where ResultType == 0
| where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
| where isnotempty(LocationDetails)
| extend
    Lat        = toreal(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.latitude),
    Lon        = toreal(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.longitude),
    Country    = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion),
    City       = tostring(LocationDetails.city),
    IPAddress  = tostring(IPAddress),
    AppName    = tostring(AppDisplayName),
    DeviceOS   = tostring(DeviceDetail.operatingSystem)
| where isnotempty(Lat) and isnotempty(Lon)
| summarize
    Locations  = make_list(pack('lat', Lat, 'lon', Lon, 'country', Country, 'city', City, 'ip', IPAddress, 'time', TimeGenerated, 'app', AppName)),
    DistinctCountries = dcount(Country),
    LoginCount = count(),
    FirstLogin = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastLogin  = max(TimeGenerated)
    by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, timeWindow)
| where DistinctCountries >= 2
| extend
    Loc1       = tostring(Locations[0]),
    Loc2       = tostring(Locations[1]),
    TimeDeltaMin = datetime_diff('minute', LastLogin, FirstLogin)
| extend
    SuspicionScore = case(
        DistinctCountries >= 3,       "CRITICAL — 3+ countries",
        TimeDeltaMin < 30,            "HIGH — < 30 min between distant logins",
        TimeDeltaMin < 60,            "HIGH — < 1 hour between distant logins",
        "MEDIUM — same hour, different countries"
    )
| project
    TimeGenerated  = FirstLogin,
    UserPrincipalName,
    DistinctCountries,
    LoginCount,
    TimeDeltaMinutes = TimeDeltaMin,
    SuspicionScore,
    FirstLogin,
    LastLogin,
    Locations

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: Impossible Travel: {{UserPrincipalName}} logged in from {{DistinctCountries}} countries
